response: The Youth Centre is located at coordinates (60, -40). It is currently operational.
The Health Center is located at (-80, -60). For emergencies, please use the SOS module immediately.
Hall 1 Lodging is at (150, 20). Check-in closes at 22:00.
Hall 2 Lodging is at (150, 60). Quiet hours start at 23:00.
The Old Auditorium is at (-120, 80). Sessions start at 09:00.
The Main Altar is the central coordinate (0, 0) of the camp.
The central dining tent is located near the Youth Centre at (50, -50). Serving times are 07:00, 13:00, and 19:00.
If a child is lost, please immediately trigger the 'Lost Child' SOS from the Emergency module. Security at the Main Altar (0,0) handles lost children.
